role_summary: Domain specification and architectural model artifact defining the bounded contexts, entity relationships, and integration sequences for an automated knowledge translation system. It delineates the stage-gated data transformation pipeline, component responsibilities, and external dependency contracts while highlighting operational boundaries and specification gaps.
finding: The system enforces a strict, unidirectional, stage-gated pipeline for converting repository artifacts into structured documentation, utilizing persistent intermediate states to support incremental processing, auditability, and fault tolerance. External intelligence is integrated as a generalized, on-demand, cross-cutting capability isolated via standardized contracts to allow swappable analytical backends, without dictating pipeline progression. Critical specification gaps exist regarding the mapping logic between extraction notes and documentation sections, as well as undefined requirements for error handling, retry mechanisms, fallback strategies, and inter-module data schemas.
